calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Continued To Dec-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Jagiello for Jarrett Roth (Administrator).

The Court informed Counsel that its tentative is to determine that the recovery agreement is ineffective and that the Estate be repaid by Keane Company. Ms. Jagiello stated that there should have been a petition for preliminary distribution, that Watchtower wants their distribution, that no one was hurt by this, that no one was out of any money and asked if the Court wants a waiver of accounting from Watchtower. Ms. Jagiello also suggested filing of a declaration from Watchtower that they are happy with what's going on, that they waive an accounting and a declaration from Mr. Roth and Mr. Berman that they will be paid any fees from the Estate. The accounting petition was continued to December 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to consider the alternate disposition as suggested by Ms. Jagiello.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clark. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Continued To Oct-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Oct-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Continued To Feb-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Jagiello for Jarrett Roth.

Ms. Jagiello stated that she believes Heir Searchers are involved. The Court stated that the assignments of interest need to be filed, that it was troubled with the will being altered, that there is no information regarding who's hand writing it is and that it would like to see a declaration from Mr. Fuentes regarding the handwriting, whether he has consulted with an Attorney and whether there is an assignment. The Petition to Determine Distribution Rights was continued to February 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Continued To Jul-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Hansen for Charles Happel.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Hansen appeared to inform the Court that her Client has an objection, requested a continuance and stated that she will file the objection to the petition. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to July 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Objections are to be filed by July 5, 2012.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
